name: Jyske Invest - Nye Obligationsmarkeder Valuta KL
summary: Jyske Invest - Nye Obligationsmarkeder Valuta KL is a fixed income mutual fund launched and managed by Jyske Invest A/S. It invests in the fixed income markets of emerging markets across the globe. The fund invests in local currency bonds issued by or guaranteed by government. It employs active management style to manage its portfolio. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the JP Morgan Government Bond Index-Emerging Markets Global Diversified Unhedged (converted to USD). Jyske Invest - Nye Obligationsmarkeder Valuta KL was formed on September 18, 2005 and is domiciled in Denmark.
